title: Bug? Monday Forms inaccessible without login
excerpt:
Hi there, 
A few clients use Monday’s internal forms to submit entries, as of today 20MAR2023, all forms links re-directs users to a page saying: 
“Please log in to fill this form” 
“Authentication is required in order t…

posts.author: Kofi (Kofi FiftyTechSolutions.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

A few clients use Monday’s internal forms to submit entries, as of today 20MAR2023, all forms links re-directs users to a page saying:
“Please log in to fill this form”
“Authentication is required in order to submit this form”

As clients all use this type of Form to allow non-Monday users to submit entries to the board.

Is this normal or a bug?

Thank you

posts.author: rturnage (Robert Turnage)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m having the same issue. Up until about an hour ago all our forms were working fine. Now none of them are. Outside users get this screen and are asked to log in:

Screen Shot 2023-03-20 at 11.06.14 AM1396×815 30.8 KB

posts.author: Kofi (Kofi FiftyTechSolutions.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
rturnage:

m having the same issue. Up until about an hour ago all our forms

It has impacted all my client’s forms. Are you using WorkForms, or the internal Monday forms?

posts.author: rturnage (Robert Turnage)
posts.cookedHtml: Internal Monday forms. I opened a support ticket earlier. My forms are all working properly again, and support verified it was a problem on their end.

posts.author: Anders_Wagenblast (Anders A. Wagenblast)
posts.cookedHtml: This seems to be an issue again. When people try to enter the form they recieve this screen:

posts.author: jack456jokky (Jack Jokky)
posts.cookedHtml:
Kofi FiftyTechSolutions.com:

A few clients use Monday’s internal forms to submit entries, as of today 20MAR2023, all forms links VanillaGift com re-directs users to a page saying:
“Please log in to fill this form”
“Authentication is required in order to submit this form”

As clients all use this type of Form to allow non-Monday users to submit entries to the board.

Is this normal or a bug?

Hello,

Sometimes, undergo updates that could affect how forms work. Check their status page or support channels to see if there’s been any announcements regarding changes.
